name: Grilled Plantains
instructions:
1. Peel the plantains by cutting off both ends and making a slit along the side. Remove the peel.

2. Slice the plantains diagonally into 1 cm thick pieces.

3. Melt the butter and mix it with cinnamon and a pinch of salt.

4. Brush the plantain slices with the butter mixture on both sides.

5. Heat a grill pan or skillet over medium-high heat. Grill the plantains for 2-3 minutes per side until golden brown with nice grill marks.

6. For sweet plantains, sprinkle with brown sugar during the last minute of cooking.

7. Serve hot, drizzled with honey and a squeeze of lime juice. Great as a side dish or snack.
simpleInstructions:
1. Peel and slice plantains diagonally.

2. Brush with melted butter, cinnamon, and salt.

3. Grill 2-3 minutes per side until golden.

4. Sprinkle with brown sugar if desired.

5. Serve with honey and lime.
